description: Add missing top-level description field to the Slack plugin package.json. Currently `opentabs plugin search slack` shows an empty description because npm reads the standard `description` field which is absent — the description only exists under the `opentabs.description` nested field.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/slack && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add top-level description to Slack plugin package.json
userStories.description: As a user searching for plugins, I want to see a description for the Slack plugin in search results so that I know what it does before installing.
acceptanceCriteria: plugins/slack/package.json has a top-level "description" field with value matching opentabs.description ("OpenTabs plugin for Slack")
The description appears before the "publishConfig" field for readability
cd plugins/slack && npm run build passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File: plugins/slack/package.json, line 2.

Add a `"description": "OpenTabs plugin for Slack"` field at the top level. This value should match the existing `opentabs.description` field. Place it after `"name"` and before `"publishConfig"` for consistency with npm conventions.

This is a one-line addition. The field is read by `npm view --json` and displayed by `opentabs plugin search`.
